narrative: We need to scale distributed manufacturing to support innovation and development in the US — ground systems infrastructure for aerospace, basic energy infrastructure, and cryogenic infrastructure for fusion and advanced energy.

items.headline: Roboze Secures Investment from Rule 1 Ventures to Accelerate AI-Driven Distributed Manufacturing for Defense and Critical Infrastructure - PR Newswire
items.one_liner: Roboze secured investment from Rule 1 Ventures to scale AI-driven distributed manufacturing for defense and critical infrastructure.
items.caption: This is exactly the model we need more of — distributed, AI-driven manufacturing purpose-built for defense and critical infrastructure. Scaling production closer to the point of need is how we rebuild industrial resilience. #DistributedManufacturing #DefenseIndustry #AerospaceMfg

items.headline: NRC approves construction of advanced nuclear reactor in Wyoming - Utility Dive
items.one_liner: The NRC approved construction of TerraPower's advanced Natrium nuclear reactor in Wyoming, the first commercial reactor permit in years.
items.caption: The NRC just issued the first commercial nuclear construction permit in decades. Advanced energy infrastructure demands advanced manufacturing — cryogenic systems, specialty materials, precision fabrication. This is a signal to scale. #AdvancedEnergy #NuclearInfrastructure #SupplyChain

items.headline: US issues first commercial construction permit for a nuclear reactor in years to a Wyoming project - KGNS
items.one_liner: The NRC issued the first US commercial nuclear reactor construction permit in years for TerraPower's Wyoming project.
items.caption: First commercial nuclear construction permit in years. Building advanced reactors means building an entire manufacturing ecosystem — from specialty alloys to cryogenic components. The supply chain buildout starts now. #NuclearEnergy #EnergyInfrastructure #AdvancedManufacturing

items.headline: Nuclear startup TerraPower wins US approval to build commercial SMR plant - The Korea Economic Daily Global Edition
items.source: The Korea Economic Daily Global Edition
items.one_liner: TerraPower won US approval to build a commercial small modular reactor plant in Wyoming.
items.caption: TerraPower's SMR approval is a milestone — but the real bottleneck is manufacturing capacity. Scaling advanced nuclear means scaling the ground systems, materials, and cryogenic infrastructure to support it. #SMR #EnergyInfrastructure #AerospaceMfg

items.headline: US issues first commercial construction permit for a nuclear reactor in years to a Wyoming project - ABC News
items.one_liner: The US issued its first commercial nuclear reactor construction permit in years for TerraPower's Wyoming project.
items.caption: A nuclear construction permit is a policy milestone. The industrial challenge is what follows — can US manufacturing deliver the precision components, cryogenic systems, and infrastructure these reactors require at scale? #NuclearEnergy #SupplyChain #AdvancedManufacturing

items.headline: TerraPower Nuclear Reactor in Wyoming Gets Federal Permit - The New York Times
items.one_liner: TerraPower received a federal permit to construct its Natrium nuclear reactor in Wyoming.
items.caption: TerraPower's federal permit is a clear signal: the US is serious about advanced energy. Now we need the distributed manufacturing base to match — specialty fabrication, cryogenic infrastructure, and ground systems at scale. #NuclearEnergy #EnergyInfrastructure #DefenseIndustry

items.headline: US issues first commercial construction permit for a nuclear reactor in years to a Wyoming project - Caledonian Record
items.one_liner: The NRC granted TerraPower the first US commercial nuclear construction permit in years for its Wyoming reactor.
items.caption: Every advanced reactor approved is a demand signal for the manufacturing ecosystem behind it. Distributed production of critical components isn't optional — it's the prerequisite. #AdvancedEnergy #NuclearInfrastructure #SupplyChain

items.headline: A Historic First: NRC Clears TerraPower’s Natrium Nuclear Reactor for Construction - POWER Magazine
items.one_liner: The NRC cleared TerraPower's Natrium reactor for construction in a historic first for advanced nuclear technology.
items.caption: Historic: NRC clears Natrium for construction. Advanced nuclear won't scale on permits alone — it requires a parallel buildout of cryogenic, energy, and ground systems manufacturing across the US. That's the real work ahead. #NuclearEnergy #AdvancedManufacturing #EnergyInfrastructure

items.headline: US issues first commercial construction permit for a nuclear reactor in years to a Wyoming project - Star Beacon
items.one_liner: The US issued its first commercial nuclear reactor construction permit in years for a Wyoming project by TerraPower.
items.caption: The permit is the starting line. Scaling advanced nuclear means scaling the entire upstream manufacturing base — precision components, cryogenic systems, and distributed production capacity. #NuclearEnergy #SupplyChain #AdvancedManufacturing

items.headline: US issues first commercial construction permit for a nuclear reactor in years to a Wyoming project - The Telluride Times
items.one_liner: TerraPower's Wyoming nuclear reactor project received the first US commercial construction permit in years.
items.caption: One reactor permit, one state. But the manufacturing implications are national. Advanced energy infrastructure requires distributed fabrication, cryogenic capability, and industrial depth we must rebuild. #EnergyInfrastructure #DistributedManufacturing #NuclearEnergy
